_comment: Real Cab: mapeo de cabs RS de guitarra y bajo al modelo físico (rb_core/cab_synth.py). La CONFIG combina drivers/size/back con geometría documentada cuando existe. speaker_confidence indica cuánto conocemos del parlante; speaker_proxy=true identifica explícitamente OEMs aproximados mediante curvas donantes y especificaciones de sistema. Nunca presentar un proxy como el driver real. 'name' = nombre parodia para la UI. 'speakers' = opciones de swap (primera = default).

Cab_AT0112C.speaker: seventy80
Cab_AT0112C.enclosure_source: Cabs/enclosure/marshall1x12.png and Marshall official MX112 specifications (500x470x290 mm, closed MDF enclosure, one 16-ohm Celestion Seventy-80)
Cab_AT0112C.name: Marsten MX112

Cab_AT1121C.speaker: g12b150_proxy
Cab_AT1121C.proxy_basis: G12T-75, EVM12L and BP102 donor curves constrained by the G12B-150's 2-inch voice coil, 50 oz ceramic magnet, 60-4000 Hz range and 77 Hz resonance
Cab_AT1121C.enclosure_source: Marshall Japan 1912 archive (510x465x290 mm, one 8-ohm G12B-150); front-vented closed cabinet topology retained from the physical 1912 design
Cab_AT1121C.name: Marsten 1912

Cab_BT1120C.speaker: vtype
Cab_BT1120C.enclosure_source: Cabs/enclosure/vox bc112.pdf + VOX BC112 official specifications (semi-open back with oval port, 520x445x260 mm, Celestion V-Type)
Cab_BT1120C.name: Box BC112 1x12

Cab_BT1121C.speaker: blue
Cab_BT1121C.name: Box AC15 1x12
Cab_BT1121C.enclosure_source: Vox AC15C1 published specs (combo shell 602x456x265 mm, open back)

Cab_BT410C.speaker: p10q
Cab_BT410C.name: Box 4x10
Cab_BT410C.enclosure_source: No documented Vox 4x10 guitar cab; styled on the '59 Bassman-format 4x10 open-back combo shell (23.5x22.5x10.5 in) matching its P10Q alnico drivers

Cab_CA112C.speaker: v30
Cab_CA112C.enclosure_source: MESA/Boogie official 1x12 Recto specifications (sealed, Vintage 30, 18 1/3x18 2/3x14 in)
Cab_CA112C.name: Silla Recto 1x12

Cab_CA215C.speaker: mesa_subway15_proxy
Cab_CA215C.material: lightweight Italian poplar with aviation-style bracing
Cab_CA215C.hf_driver: MESA high-frequency horn with premium attenuator
Cab_CA215C.proxy_basis: Celestion Pulse 15 and Eminence CB158 donor curves, constrained by MESA F3/F6/F10 and sensitivity specifications
Cab_CA215C.enclosure_source: MESA/Boogie official Subway 2x15 Vertical specifications (Tri-Port, 34 3/8x19 1/4x19 1/2 in, F3 57.2 Hz, F6 47.2 Hz, F10 38.6 Hz)
Cab_CA215C.name: Silla Subway 2x15

Cab_CA412C.speaker: v30
Cab_CA412C.enclosure_source: MESA/Boogie official Rectifier Standard Oversized 4x12 specifications (sealed, 32 7/8x30 1/8x14 1/4 in)
Cab_CA412C.name: Silla Recto Standard OS 4x12

Cab_CS1120C.speaker: v30
Cab_CS1120C.name: Citrus PPC112
Cab_CS1120C.enclosure_source: Orange PPC112 published specs (closed, 55x45x29 cm, 13-ply 18 mm birch)

Cab_CS1515C.speaker: g12h
Cab_CS1515C.name: Citrus 1x15
Cab_CS1515C.enclosure_source: No documented Orange guitar 1x15; shell estimated between the PPC212 and OBC115 formats

Cab_CS212C.speaker: mod12110
Cab_CS212C.name: Ronald JC-120 2x12
Cab_CS212C.enclosure_source: Roland JC-120 owner's manual specs (combo 760x622x280 mm incl. casters, open back)

Cab_EN4120C.speaker: v30
Cab_EN4120C.name: Engel E412
Cab_EN4120C.enclosure_source: ENGL E412 published specs (closed, 74x75x36 cm, Siberian birch)

Cab_GB412CMKI.speaker: fane122231_proxy
Cab_GB412CMKI.enclosure_source: Cabs/enclosure/hiwatt4x12.pdf (SE 4123 lead cabinet: ported/tuned, 30x30x13 in, 50-8000 Hz, 75 Hz driver resonance)
Cab_GB412CMKI.proxy_basis: Celestion G12H and EV EVM12L donor curves constrained by the documented 75 Hz resonance and 50 Hz-8 kHz cabinet range
Cab_GB412CMKI.name: Lovolt SE4123

Cab_GB412CMKII.speaker: g12h
Cab_GB412CMKII.name: Mr. Y Maz 4x12
Cab_GB412CMKII.enclosure_source: No documented Dr. Z 4x12 exists (the real Maz cab is the ported Z-Best 2x12, 19.25x28.25x13.75 in); standard UK 4x12 shell assumed

Cab_GB412CMKIII.speaker: g12t75
Cab_GB412CMKIII.name: Raney GS412
Cab_GB412CMKIII.enclosure_source: Laney GS412 published specs (715x715x358 mm) as the documented Laney 4x12 shell for the AOR-era cab

Cab_HG2120C.speaker: g12t75
Cab_HG2120C.name: PeeBee 2120
Cab_HG2120C.enclosure_source: Peavey 212-C published specs (27.9 x 17.7 x 11.4 in, 18 mm plywood, convertible back run closed; ships a Celestion V30 + G12T-75 pair - the family identity is Peavey per the user)

Cab_HG212C.speaker: g12t75
Cab_HG212C.name: PeeBee 212-C
Cab_HG212C.enclosure_source: Peavey 212-C published specs (27.9 x 17.7 x 11.4 in, 18 mm plywood, convertible back run closed; ships a Celestion V30 + G12T-75 pair - the family identity is Peavey per the user)

Cab_HG215C.speaker: evm15l
Cab_HG215C.name: PeeBee 215
Cab_HG215C.enclosure_source: Vintage Peavey 215 Enclosure, owner-measured 40 x 25.25 x 14.375 in (Reverb listings agree at 102-112 x 65 x 36-38 cm); sealed column, factory Black Widow pair
Cab_HG215C.proxy_basis: Peavey Black Widow 1505 pro 15 proxied by the EVM15L datasheet curve (closest documented pro full-range 15)

Cab_MARSHALL1936.speaker: g12t75
Cab_MARSHALL1936.enclosure_source: Cabs/enclosure/marshall1936A2x12.png and Marshall official 1936 specifications (740x600x305 mm, closed plywood cabinet, two G12T-75)
Cab_MARSHALL1936.name: Marsten 1936 2x12

Cab_MARSHALL1960A.speaker: g12t75
Cab_MARSHALL1960A.material: birch plywood shell with MDF rear panel
Cab_MARSHALL1960A.enclosure_source: Cabs/enclosure/marshall1960A4x12.png and Marshall official 1960A specifications (770x755x365 mm, angled closed cabinet, four G12T-75)
Cab_MARSHALL1960A.name: Marsten 1960A 4x12

Cab_MARSHALL1960AX.speaker: g12m
Cab_MARSHALL1960AX.enclosure_source: Cabs/enclosure/marshall1960AX4x12.png and Marshall official 1960AX specifications (770x755x365 mm, angled closed cabinet, four G12M-25)
Cab_MARSHALL1960AX.name: Marsten 1960AX 4x12

Cab_MARSHALL1960TV.speaker: g12m
Cab_MARSHALL1960TV.enclosure_source: Cabs/enclosure/marshall1960TV4x12.png and Marshall official 1960TV specifications (770x820x365 mm, tall angled closed cabinet, four G12M-25)
Cab_MARSHALL1960TV.name: Marsten 1960TV 4x12

Cab_ORANGEJIMMYBEAN.speaker: v30
Cab_ORANGEJIMMYBEAN.name: Citrus Jimmy Bean 4x12
Cab_ORANGEJIMMYBEAN.enclosure_source: Orange PPC412 shell (78x74x38 cm, 13-ply 18 mm birch) - the game's fictional Orange 4x12 signature

Cab_ORANGEPPC212OB.speaker: v30
Cab_ORANGEPPC212OB.name: Citrus PPC212 Open-Back
Cab_ORANGEPPC212OB.enclosure_source: Orange PPC212OB published specs (open back, 66x52x30 cm, 13-ply 18 mm birch)

Cab_ORANGEPPC412.speaker: v30
Cab_ORANGEPPC412.name: Citrus PPC412
Cab_ORANGEPPC412.enclosure_source: Orange PPC412 published specs (closed, 78x74x38 cm, 13-ply 18 mm birch)

Cab_TW112C.speaker: v30
Cab_TW112C.enclosure_source: Fender Super-Sonic 22 owner's manual specs (24x17.5x8.5 in combo shell); Cabs/enclosure/fender2x12supersonic.pdf confirms the Vintage 30 and 19 mm 13-ply birch
Cab_TW112C.name: Bender Supernova 1x12

Cab_TW410C.speaker: rumble10_proxy
Cab_TW410C.proxy_basis: Eminence BP102 and Deltalite II 2510 donor curves, constrained by the 2010 Fender cabinet topology and power rating
Cab_TW410C.enclosure_source: Cabs/enclosure/fender4x10rumble.pdf (584.2x635x365 mm, four Fender Special Design 10-inch drivers, piezo tweeter); front slot-port topology from the product drawing
Cab_TW410C.name: Bender Rumble 4x10

Bass_Cab_AT810BC.name: Sampleg SVT 8x10
Bass_Cab_AT810BC.speaker: bp102
Bass_Cab_AT810BC.enclosure_source: Ampeg SVT-810E published specs (sealed infinite-baffle, 26x48x16 in, -3 dB 58 Hz, -10 dB 40 Hz, 100 dB)

Bass_Cab_AT1150BC.name: Sampleg SVT-15E
Bass_Cab_AT1150BC.speaker: cb158
Bass_Cab_AT1150BC.enclosure_source: Ampeg SVT-15E published specs (24x22x16 in, -3 dB 50 Hz, -10 dB 33 Hz, 98 dB)

Bass_Cab_BT212BC.name: Freddy Neo 212
Bass_Cab_BT212BC.speaker: deltalite2512
Bass_Cab_BT212BC.enclosure_source: GK Neo 212-II published specs (front-ported, 23.5x24.5x16.5 in, -3 dB 53 Hz, Paragon horn, 11-ply poplar)

Bass_Cab_BT410BC.name: Freddy CX410
Bass_Cab_BT410BC.speaker: gk_cx10_proxy
Bass_Cab_BT410BC.proxy_basis: Eminence BP102 and Deltalite II 2510 donor curves constrained by GK's 51 Hz-18 kHz, 103 dB system specification

Bass_Cab_CA1510BC.name: Silla PowerHouse 1x15
Bass_Cab_CA1510BC.speaker: mesa_powerhouse15_proxy
Bass_Cab_CA1510BC.material: marine-grade Baltic birch with aviation-style bracing
Bass_Cab_CA1510BC.driver_model: MESA custom Eminence 15-inch for Standard PowerHouse (documented proxy)
Bass_Cab_CA1510BC.hf_driver: MESA high-frequency horn with 3/4/5 kHz Player Control network
Bass_Cab_CA1510BC.proxy_basis: Eminence CB158 and Celestion Pulse 15 donor curves, aligned to the official Standard PowerHouse construction and crossover
Bass_Cab_CA1510BC.enclosure_source: MESA/Boogie official Standard PowerHouse 1x15 specifications (Tri-Port, 19 3/8x24 1/2x19 3/4 in, custom Eminence, selectable 3/4/5 kHz crossover)

Bass_Cab_CH210BC.name: SBR Workingman 2x10
Bass_Cab_CH210BC.speaker: deltalite2510
Bass_Cab_CH210BC.enclosure_source: SWR Workingman's 2x10T manual specs (23x17x16.25 in, -3 dB 63 Hz, Le-Son piezo tweeter)

Bass_Cab_CH310BC.name: Seismik SA-310
Bass_Cab_CH310BC.speaker: deltalite2510
Bass_Cab_CH310BC.enclosure_source: Seismic Audio SA-310 published specs (21.5x23x16.5 in, 5/8 in plywood, claimed 40 Hz-16 kHz, piezo tweeter)

Bass_Cab_CH410BC.name: SBR Goliath 4x10
Bass_Cab_CH410BC.speaker: deltalite2510
Bass_Cab_CH410BC.enclosure_source: SWR Goliath III published specs (23x25.25x18.375 in, -3 dB 40 Hz, 105 dB, Foster horn)

Bass_Cab_CS112BC.name: Sharke HyDrive HD112
Bass_Cab_CS112BC.speaker: hydrive12_proxy
Bass_Cab_CS112BC.material: solid plywood with extensive bracing and dado joinery
Bass_Cab_CS112BC.driver_model: Hartke HyDrive 12-inch paper/aluminum hybrid cone (documented proxy)
Bass_Cab_CS112BC.proxy_basis: Eminence Deltalite II 2512 and EV EVM12L donor curves, constrained by Hartke's published 35 Hz-17 kHz system response
Bass_Cab_CS112BC.enclosure_source: Hartke official HyDrive HD112 specifications (vented, 16x19x15 in, -3 dB 35 Hz-17 kHz, -10 dB at 25 Hz)

Bass_Cab_CS15BC.name: Sharke HyDrive HL115
Bass_Cab_CS15BC.speaker: hydrive15_proxy
Bass_Cab_CS15BC.material: 16 mm kiln-dried plywood with extensive bracing and dado joinery
Bass_Cab_CS15BC.driver_model: Hartke HyDrive 15-inch paper/aluminum neodymium cone (documented proxy)
Bass_Cab_CS15BC.proxy_basis: Celestion Pulse 15 and Eminence CB158 donor curves, constrained by Hartke's published 35 Hz-17 kHz system response
Bass_Cab_CS15BC.enclosure_source: Hartke official HyDrive HL115 specifications (front-ported, 24x24x15 in, -3 dB 35 Hz-17 kHz, -10 dB at 20 Hz)

Bass_Cab_CS410BC.name: Sharke HyDrive HD410
Bass_Cab_CS410BC.speaker: hydrive10_proxy
Bass_Cab_CS410BC.driver_model: four Hartke HyDrive 10-inch paper/aluminum hybrid cones (documented proxy)
Bass_Cab_CS410BC.proxy_basis: Eminence Deltalite II 2510 and BP102 donor curves, constrained by Hartke's published 50 Hz-17 kHz system response
Bass_Cab_CS410BC.enclosure_source: Hartke official HyDrive HD410 specifications (sealed dual chamber, 24x24x15 in, -3 dB 50 Hz-17 kHz)

Bass_Cab_EDEND115XLT.name: Edena D115XLT
Bass_Cab_EDEND115XLT.speaker: cb158
Bass_Cab_EDEND115XLT.enclosure_source: Eden D115XLT published specs (ported, 23x25.5x18.5 in, 46 Hz-14 kHz, tweeter xover 3.5 kHz)

Bass_Cab_EDEND212XLT.name: Edena D212XLT
Bass_Cab_EDEND212XLT.speaker: deltalite2512
Bass_Cab_EDEND212XLT.enclosure_source: Eden D212XLT published specs (ported, 23x27.5x18.5 in, 40 Hz-14 kHz, tweeter xover 3.5 kHz)

Bass_Cab_EDEND410XST.name: Edena D410XST
Bass_Cab_EDEND410XST.speaker: deltalite2510
Bass_Cab_EDEND410XST.enclosure_source: Eden D410XST published specs (ported, 36 Hz-14 kHz, 104 dB, aluminium tweeter; dims from the published XST family sheet)

Bass_Cab_EDEND610XST.name: Edena D610XST
Bass_Cab_EDEND610XST.speaker: deltalite2510
Bass_Cab_EDEND610XST.enclosure_source: Eden D610XST published specs (ported, 23x38.5x16 in, 50 Hz-14 kHz)

Bass_Cab_GB415BC.name: Lovolt B415HN
Bass_Cab_GB415BC.speaker: fane_bass15_proxy
Bass_Cab_GB415BC.driver_model: Fane 15-inch bass family (documented proxy; exact 4x15 load unidentified)
Bass_Cab_GB415BC.proxy_basis: Official Fane Sovereign 15-400 response and Eminence/EV donor curves; Hiwatt's available catalog confirms Fane bass drivers but not this legacy 4x15 configuration
Bass_Cab_GB415BC.enclosure_source: Cabs/enclosure/hiwatt bass.pdf p.23: Hiwatt B410HN (665 x 730 x 475 mm, 18 mm birch ply, piezo horn, 600 W) as the documented Hiwatt bass-cab reference, baffle plane scaled x1.5 for the 2x2 grid of 15-inch drivers

Bass_Cab_ORANGEOBC115.name: Citrus OBC115
Bass_Cab_ORANGEOBC115.speaker: cb158
Bass_Cab_ORANGEOBC115.enclosure_source: Orange OBC115 published specs (side-ported, 62x52x46.5 cm, Eminence Kappa 15, 13-ply 18 mm birch)

Bass_Cab_ORANGEOBC810.name: Citrus OBC810
Bass_Cab_ORANGEOBC810.speaker: bp102
Bass_Cab_ORANGEOBC810.enclosure_source: Orange OBC810 published specs (rear-ported, 61.5x123x46 cm, four voiced compartments, 13-ply 18 mm birch)

Bass_Cab_TW215BC.name: Bender Bassman 2x15
Bass_Cab_TW215BC.speaker: c15n
Bass_Cab_TW215BC.enclosure_source: Cabs/enclosure/fender2x15bassman.pdf (7.3 ft3 corrected to 206.7 L; manufacturer metric value is a typo)
